description: Hungarian language reference — verbs, irregular forms, and more.

modules.label: Verbs
modules.description: Hungarian verbs grouped by semantic category. Each family shows how adding a prefix (igekötő) shifts the meaning, with two example sentences per form.

categories.label: Object actions
categories.description: Holding, pushing, pulling, throwing, giving — what you do to or with things.

categories.label: Movement & direction
categories.description: Going, transport, turning — direction encoded in the prefix.

categories.label: Speaking & communication
categories.description: Saying, writing, showing, asking — verbal exchange.

categories.label: Physical actions
categories.description: Cutting, filling, breaking, folding — manipulation of matter.

categories.label: State changes
categories.description: Becoming, sleeping, deteriorating, using — changes in condition.

categories.label: Digital & tech
categories.description: Downloading, switching, logging in — modern vocabulary.

modules.label: Irregular verbs
modules.description: Verbs with unpredictable stem changes across tenses. Full conjugation tables with example sentences.

categories.label: All irregular verbs
categories.description: sz-v alternation, suppletive tenses, and defective modals.
